prevalence.trend: stable to increasing with rheumatic and ischemic disease

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Echocardiography to grade severity and LV function; assess symptoms

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no screening; diagnosis via auscultation and echo
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Low to moderate; surgical access varies

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Echo access largely in urban/tertiary centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Medical therapy for heart failure; surgical repair/replacement when feasible
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Late presentation and limited access to valve repair
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Growing cardiac surgery capacity and low-cost generics
